positive: A stylized, whimsical depiction of a lone hot air balloon floating above a vast, ethereal landscape of pastel rolling hills and stylized, geometrically abstract mountains. The hot air balloon, the central subject, is colorful and slightly translucent, carrying silhouetted figures that appear to be reading books or simply gazing at the horizon. The overall aesthetic should be highly decorative and reminiscent of modern folk illustration, using thick, clean outlines and limited, high-contrast color blocks (teal, soft ochre, burnt orange, lavender). The composition must be central and symmetrically balanced, designed to look stunning when printed on fabric. The sky should have clean, dramatic gradations of color, with visible, crisp cloud structures. Focus on strong silhouettes and clean vector art qualities. Full view, dreamlike, joyous, adventurous, high saturation, detailed linework, flat graphic design style.
negative: blurry, low resolution, out of focus, text, watermark, signature, logo, cropped, distorted, noise, amateur, jpeg artifacts, gradient shadows, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealism, 3d render, depth of field
